name: paris_rome_travel_comparison
description: Research top 3 tourist attractions in Paris and Rome, compare them side by side, and save to a markdown file

tasks.name: research_paris_attractions
tasks.description: You MUST call web_search to find the top 3 tourist attractions in Paris. Search for 'top 3 tourist attractions Paris 2026'. Output the FULL raw search results verbatim (URLs, titles, snippets). Do NOT summarize as 'results were found' — downstream tasks need the actual data. Output format: Include all URLs, titles, and description snippets from the search results.
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains at least 3 URLs with titles and snippets mentioning Paris tourist attractions

tasks.name: research_rome_attractions
tasks.description: You MUST call web_search to find the top 3 tourist attractions in Rome. Search for 'top 3 tourist attractions Rome 2026'. Output the FULL raw search results verbatim (URLs, titles, snippets). Do NOT summarize as 'results were found' — downstream tasks need the actual data. Output format: Include all URLs, titles, and description snippets from the search results.
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains at least 3 URLs with titles and snippets mentioning Rome tourist attractions

tasks.name: analyze_and_format_comparison
tasks.description: Extract the top 3 tourist attractions from task_001 (Paris) and task_002 (Rome) based on the search results. For each attraction, extract: name, brief description (2-3 sentences). Create a side-by-side markdown comparison table with columns: Attraction Name, City, Description. Do NOT invent attraction names or descriptions — cite only what appears in task_001 and task_002 outputs. If fewer than 3 attractions are clearly identifiable, say 'insufficient data' for missing entries. Output format: Markdown table with headers | Attraction | City | Description |
tasks.success_criteria: Output is a valid markdown table with 6 rows (3 Paris + 3 Rome) containing attraction names and descriptions sourced from previous tasks

tasks.name: save_to_file
tasks.description: You MUST call file_write to save the markdown comparison from task_003 to a file named 'travel_comparison.md'. Use the exact output from task_003 as the file content. The file path should be 'travel_comparison.md'. Do NOT modify or summarize the content — write it verbatim.
tasks.success_criteria: File 'travel_comparison.md' is created and contains the markdown table from task_003

metadata.goal: Research top 3 tourist attractions in Paris and Rome, compare them, and save to file
